name: Old Fashioned Mince Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Mix mincemeat and apple.
3. Pour mixture into a 9-inch pastry-lined pie pan.
4. Cover with top crust that has slits cut in it. Seal and flute.
5. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the crust is nicely browned.
6. Serve slightly warm.
